title: Sable's Armor Trims
description: This resource pack is a re-imagination of the armor trim textures.
body:
I wanted some more interesting armor trim options, so I made my own textures! These are mostly inspired off of the vanilla trim textures and simply tweaked to add more flair, but there were some trims I changed to a different design altogether. 

I also chose not to change the Silence trim since it's iconic and rare. x3
